governingPrinciples: Do not equate active-grid row completeness with source-witness trust.
Prefer source-shape/source-scope certification when the source witness is trustworthy but not active-grid symmetric.
Use adapter policy for appointed-reading rendering when verse divisions differ.
Do not move to broad canon until Deuterocanon is certified or explicitly blocked by governed boundaries.

repairOrder.title: Catholic deuterocanon source-shape/source-scope certification
repairOrder.rule: Certify rows only by source address, governed source-shape adapter, or recorded source-scope absence. No synthetic fills and no splitting without adapter policy.

repairOrder.title: Greek Esther and Greek Daniel form policy
repairOrder.rule: Resolve form, Catholic/Greek addition boundaries, and versification policy before text mutation or trust promotion.

repairOrder.title: Apocrypha/broader-boundary deuterocanon books
repairOrder.rule: Keep source-scope absences and variant-footnote material governed unless a variant apparatus or source-address display policy is created.

repairOrder.title: Broad canon repair begins only after Deuterocanon closure
repairOrder.rule: Do not promote or repair broad canon until Deuterocanon has a trust certification or explicit blocked-boundary record.

nextAction: Run DEUTERO-01 source-scope/source-shape repair against Catholic deuterocanon books.
